class.name: ASEffectModifier
class.brief_description: Represents a single attribute modifier for effects.
class.description:
ASEffectModifier defines how an effect modifies a specific attribute. Contains the attribute name, operation type (add, multiply, set, etc.), and magnitude value for the modification.
Used by ASEffect to define attribute changes and by ASEffectSpec for runtime modifier calculations. Supports serialization for save/load operations and network replication.

method.name: to_dict
method.description: Converts the modifier to a Dictionary for serialization.

method.name: from_dict
method.description: Loads modifier data from a Dictionary created by to_dict().

members.member: The name of the attribute this modifier affects.
The magnitude/value used for the modification operation.
